preconditions: Application login page is accessible at http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined
Login page should display username textbox, password textbox, SIGN IN button, home navigation button, and back navigation button

testCases.title: Verify login page loads with correct URL and UI elements
steps: Observe the page URL and login form elements
testCases.expectedResult: Browser URL remains http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined and username textbox, password textbox, SIGN IN button, home navigation button, and back navigation button are visible on the page

testCases.title: Verify username textbox is visible and accepts input
steps: Click inside the username textbox and type a sample username
testCases.expectedResult: Username textbox is visible, enabled, receives focus when clicked, and displays the entered text

testCases.title: Verify password textbox is visible and masks characters
steps: Type a sample password into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Password textbox is visible and enabled and the entered characters are masked (shown as dots or asterisks) instead of plain text

testCases.title: Verify SIGN IN button is visible and clickable
steps: Click the SIGN IN button without entering credentials
testCases.expectedResult: SIGN IN button is visible and clickable and the login form remains on the login page indicating login cannot proceed without valid credentials

testCases.title: Verify successful login with valid credentials
steps: Enter hacklarr in the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: User is authenticated successfully and redirected to the home page where the browser URL becomes http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home and the home page UI is displayed

testCases.title: Verify login fails with incorrect password
steps: Enter hacklarr in the username textbox
Enter incorrectPassword in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, user remains on the login page URL, the application does not navigate to the home page, and a visible authentication failure or sign‑in error message is displayed

testCases.title: Verify login fails with invalid username
steps: Enter invaliduser in the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and the application remains on the login page without redirecting to the home page and an authentication failure indication is visible

testCases.title: Verify login fails with both username and password invalid
steps: Enter invaliduser in the username textbox
Enter invalidPassword in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected, the login page remains displayed, and no navigation to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home occurs

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with empty username and password
testCases.expectedResult: Login is rejected and the user remains on the login page without navigation to the home page

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with username only
steps: Enter hacklarr in the username textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication does not succeed and the application stays on the login page without redirecting to the home page

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with password only
steps: Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication does not succeed and the login page remains displayed without redirecting to the home page

testCases.title: Verify navigation using home navigation button
testCases.expectedResult: Application navigates to the home page and the browser URL becomes http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify navigation using back navigation button
testCases.expectedResult: Application navigates to the home page and the browser URL becomes http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify login with leading and trailing whitespace in username
steps: Enter ' hacklarr ' including leading and trailing spaces in the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Application processes the input without UI errors; user is either authenticated and redirected to the home page if whitespace is trimmed or login fails and the login page remains displayed

testCases.title: Verify login with very long username input
steps: Enter a very long string exceeding typical username length in the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Application handles the long input without crashing or breaking the UI and authentication fails while remaining on the login page

testCases.title: Verify repeated clicking of SIGN IN button during login attempt
steps: Enter hacklarr in the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
Rapidly click the SIGN IN button multiple times
testCases.expectedResult: Application processes the login request once and redirects to the home page a single time without duplicate redirects or UI errors

testCases.title: Verify login submission using Enter key
steps: Enter hacklarr in the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
Press the Enter key while focused on the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Login form submits and the user is redirected to the home page with URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify login using pasted credentials
steps: Paste hacklarr into the username textbox
Paste Icstunnel1 into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Application accepts pasted values and authenticates successfully and redirects to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify username case sensitivity during login
steps: Enter HACKLARR in the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: If the system enforces case sensitivity login fails and the user remains on the login page with an authentication error; otherwise the user is redirected to the home page
